name: GPS Constellation
description: 31 active satellites at 20,200 km. Every navigation app, every drone, every ship at sea depends on this constellation. Originally military, opened to civilians in 1983. Signal accuracy: 30 cm for civilian use, 1 cm for military.
scale_fact: GPS is 50× higher than the ISS. You've never looked up and seen it — but it knows exactly where you are.
